docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDIT, JAYANTA AS TO DEFENDANT GHOSH, SHARMILA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
